column3: "Sage relieves pain" refers to its ability to soothe aching areas or muscles due to inflammation.
"Sage reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to decrease swelling caused by body responses due to injury or illness.
"Sage boosts immunity" refers to its ability to increase or enhance the body's natural defense system against illnesses and diseases.
"Sage fights cancer" refers to its ability to help prevent or treat certain types of cancer.
"Sage lowers blood sugar" refers to its ability of altering body functions that control glucose levels.
"Sage improves digestion" refers to its ability to help our body process food more efficiently.
"Sage supports heart health" refers to its ability to improve blood circulation and possibly prevent diseases associated with poor cardiovascular function.
"Sage reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its ability of minimizing mental tension and emotional distress.
"Sage promotes sleep" refers to its ability to soothe the mind and body, making it easier for a person to fall asleep.
"Sage enhances cognitive function" refers to its ability to boost memory retention and mental clarity, potentially improving overall brain performance.
